toolchain.note: Upstream publishes ONNX directly; no paddle2onnx step. Shapes fixed with onnxslim 0.1.59.

dictionary.layout: line 0 = 'blank' placeholder, then characters, then a trailing space
dictionary.warning: medium and small share this charset; tiny is a separate 6906-class charset and must use its own file

task_metric.name: greedy CTC decode matches PaddleOCR output on the same crop
task_metric.measured_onnx: PASS at 48x960; at 48x320 a 19.8:1 crop loses characters to the aspect squeeze (expected, not a defect)

measured.note: No .hbm has been compiled yet. No quantisation, latency or board figures exist for this model; the cosine values above are gates, not measurements.

open_questions: Erf (GELU) appears in both graphs; cost is unmeasured. node_info.csv cannot settle it -- its ON column shows '--' for fused/non-standalone nodes, which is not evidence of CPU fallback. Measure latency on the board instead.
Recognition is a transformer-ish SVTR stack; if int8 PTQ degrades, read per-layer cosine only to localise, not to accept or reject (see CONVERSION.md).
